title: Breach of restraining order service/order proof missing
mainIssue: The bundle alleges contact but does not safely serve the order, service/knowledge proof, or full contact evidence.
uncertainEvidence: order terms, knowledge, and whether contact was by defendant
expectedTodayIssue: Chase the order, service proof, and full contact evidence before treating breach as established.
expectedSummaryRisk: Do not say breach is proved without the order terms and service/knowledge evidence.
polishOnlyWarnings: should not merge with generic harassment if order proof is central
